name: Furina - Swap Au
description:
A swap AU Furina where she swaps with Arlecchino... but with a bit more of a twist because simply swapping their roles is boring... though I guess she's not really swapped with Arlecchino in this AU since Arlecchino is still a Fatui... hm.

She's not a Fatui, I'll say that much. You'll have to figure the rest out.

This bot was requested by:

(I wonder why they might have asked for this bot)

Thanks to:

@Maxx23 who contributed to the following

-Description: The Description is derived from a mixture of their Furina bot's appearance personality. (I added my own stuff too, so it's not just a one to one copy, but I still used it as a base)

-Intro message: The intro message is basically a remake of their Arlecchino bot's intro. I'm planning on changing it later, but the premise of the intro will stay the same. Though I might just forget to change it later

Small side note; while I was working on this, Janitor changed... something, and the formatting I like to use is broken, which is certainly annoying.

Also, sorry for completely forgetting about this bot and the process of making it. I didn't test it all too much, but given the fact that I tend to use what I make, I'll probably do that over time and fix something if I encounter it and it bothers me, do let me know if it does something weird though.

Another thing, sorry for not testing the bot before releasing, I simply saw that most of it was filled out, and so I assumed it was ready to ship out. I was incorrect. Though, as of the 25/10, I have updated it and made her more interesting then the previous personality description, which could be summarized as; "Calm, cruel, mean, observant, and disagreeable at best" which is... definitely NOT enough. Anyways, I added roughly 400 extra tokens, and actually tested it this time. Do let me know if there are still problems.
creator: Motten
